TITLE: Apartment for rent – Edificio Kuna, San Antonio de Pereira
META_DESC: Apartment for rent in San Antonio de Pereira, Rionegro, with a 70 m² terrace, independent study, and monthly rent options with 1 or 2 parking spots. Direct rental with SURA screening and HOA included.
OG_DESC: Apartment for rent in San Antonio de Pereira with a 70 m² terrace, independent study, reserve view, and monthly rent options with 1 or 2 parking spots. HOA included.
OG_TITLE: Apartment for rent – Kuna Building, San Antonio de Pereira
HERO_EYEBROW: Direct rental · HOA included · San Antonio de Pereira
HERO_H1: Apartment for rent with a private 70 m² terrace and 1 or 2 parking spot options
HERO_P: Live in Kuna Building, Rionegro, with 75.73 m² indoors, an independent study, reserve views, and two rent options designed to match different budgets.
HERO_PRICE_HINT: Choose the 1 or 2 parking spot option and get availability, screening requirements, and final pricing on WhatsApp.
HERO_CTA_NOTE: Availability, SURA screening requirements, and visit scheduling in one message.
PRICE_OPTION_PRIMARY_DETAIL: Includes 2 private parking spots and 2 storage rooms
PRICE_OPTION_PRIMARY_FIT: Ideal if you need room for 2 cars and extra storage.
PRICE_OPTION_SECONDARY_DETAIL: Includes 1 private parking spot and 1 storage room
PRICE_OPTION_SECONDARY_FIT: Ideal if you want to lower the monthly rent without giving up storage.
PRICE_NOTE: HOA is included. We can also share availability, conditions, and next steps on WhatsApp.
DETAILS_SUB: Kuna Building · 3rd floor (1st residential level) · San Antonio de Pereira – Rionegro
FEATURE_1: 🛏 Primary bedroom with ensuite & walk-in closet
GALLERY_SUB: Explore apartment photos, a video tour of the layout, and a virtual 360° view.
TOUR_SUB: Explore the apartment from your phone or laptop.
AMENITIES_SUB: Amenities of the residential complex (some delivered, others upcoming).
LOCATION_SUB: San Antonio de Pereira, Rionegro. 45 minutes from Medellín, near José María Córdova airport and all services.
SHOP_5: Coming soon: Euro Supermarket at Silvestra Plaza
FUN_1: San Antonio Main Park, famous for artisanal desserts
SURA_SUB: The rental is handled directly, and the tenant screening is completed through SURA. Having documents ready helps speed up approval.
SURA_CARD_1_BODY: Have a copy of the applicant's ID ready. Depending on the profile, SURA may request additional backup documentation.
SURA_CARD_2_BODY: Employee: employment letter, payroll slips, and bank statements. Independent applicant: bank statements, tax ID, and if applicable, chamber of commerce or tax return.
SURA_CARD_3_BODY: Approval depends on the financial review carried out by SURA based on the submitted documents and payment capacity.
SURA_CARD_4_BODY: If you are retired, self-employed, or applying as a company, the required documents may change. Having everything ready helps avoid delays.
SURA_NOTE: * Requirements may vary depending on the applicant profile and the screening conditions.
FAQ_TITLE: Frequently asked questions before booking a visit
FAQ_SUB: Answer the most common questions before you message us and start the conversation with more clarity.
FAQ_1_Q: What is included in each rent option?
FAQ_1_A: The 2 parking spot option includes 2 private parking spots and 2 storage rooms. The 1 parking spot option includes 1 private parking spot and 1 storage room. HOA is included in both options.
FAQ_1_A_SCHEMA: The 2 parking spot option includes 2 private parking spots and 2 storage rooms. The 1 parking spot option includes 1 private parking spot and 1 storage room. HOA is included in both options.
FAQ_2_Q: How does the SURA screening process work?
FAQ_2_A: The rental is handled directly, and the tenant screening is completed through SURA. Having your ID and income documents ready helps speed up approval.
FAQ_2_A_SCHEMA: The rental is handled directly, and the tenant screening is completed through SURA. Having your ID and income documents ready helps speed up approval.
FAQ_3_A: Yes, the apartment is pet friendly. Please note that the tenant is responsible for any damage caused by their pet inside the property or common areas.
FAQ_3_A_SCHEMA: Yes, the apartment is pet friendly. The tenant is responsible for any damage caused by their pet inside the property or common areas.
FAQ_4_Q: How do I book a visit and how fast do you reply?
FAQ_4_A: You can message us on WhatsApp from any button on the page. Replies usually come during business hours so we can share availability, requirements, and coordinate an in-person or virtual visit.
FAQ_4_A_SCHEMA: You can message us on WhatsApp from any button on the page. Replies usually come during business hours so we can share availability, requirements, and coordinate an in-person or virtual visit.
CONTACT_SUB: Schedule an in-person or virtual visit via WhatsApp. Only contact channel.
